name: accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, delays in payroll tax filings cause penalties. We automate the generation of monthly payroll tax filings instead of manual preparation of payroll tax filings.
features: manual review option for generated filings
monthly reminders for payroll tax deadlines
simple user interface for filing adjustments

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, delays in payroll tax filings cause penalties. We automate the generation of monthly payroll tax filings instead of manual preparation of payroll tax filings.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual preparation of payroll tax filings
must_have_features: manual review option for generated filings
monthly reminders for payroll tax deadlines
simple user interface for filing adjustments
